serverInfo.name: symloop-services
serverInfo.title: Symloop Technology — Services Discovery
serverInfo.description: Read-only MCP server exposing Symloop Technology's flagship AI platform NOOR (sovereign AI for MENA's regulated industries), service catalog, engagement process, and contact tooling. Provided by Symloop Technology, an AI-native engineering firm headquartered in Algiers, Algeria (founded 2012, 25+ senior engineers).

list.name: get_noor_overview
list.description: Returns the NOOR flagship AI platform overview — positioning, the 12 capabilities, deployment options, target sectors. Use this when a buyer asks about Symloop's AI platform.

list.name: get_noor_capabilities
list.description: Returns detailed descriptions of NOOR's 12 standard capabilities (RAG, document AI, NL-to-SQL, specialized assistants, audit trail, multi-language).

list.name: get_noor_sector_use_cases
list.description: Returns NOOR's pre-built use cases per sector (banking, government, oil & gas, healthcare). Inputs: sector slug.

list.name: list_services
list.description: Returns Symloop's engineering service catalog (software engineering, AI/ML, mobile, cloud, IoT, cybersecurity, consulting, product engineering).

list.name: get_service_details
list.description: Returns engagement model, deliverables, and example projects for a given service.

list.name: request_noor_demo
list.description: Schedules a 60-minute NOOR demo with a Symloop engineer, tailored to the buyer's sector and data. Inputs: sector, target deployment (on-prem/sovereign/hybrid), regulatory framework, contact details.

list.name: request_quote
list.description: Submits a qualified engagement inquiry. Inputs: scope, timeline, budget range, geography, contact details.

list.name: schedule_consultation
list.description: Books a discovery call with a Symloop engineer. Inputs: preferred dates, topic, contact details.

list.name: NOOR — Sovereign AI Platform
list.description: Flagship product. AI platform engineered for MENA's regulated industries (banking, government, oil & gas, healthcare). On-premise / sovereign cloud / hybrid deployment. Audited for BCT, SAMA, DORA, ISO 27001.

list.name: About Symloop Technology
list.description: Company identity, history, leadership, sectors served. Algiers HQ, founded 2012, 25+ senior engineers.
